items.title: Scapia’s $63M fundraise; Premium ice cream brand Papacream
items.summary: Travel-fintech startup Scapia has raised $63 million in a fresh round of funding led by General Catalyst. Papacream was built around the idea that premium desserts should feel i...

items.title: Waymo expands pause to four cities as robotaxis keep driving into floods
items.summary: Waymo's robotaxi service is now suspended in both Atlanta and San Antonio, as the company works to stop its vehicles from driving into flooded roads.

items.title: Can OpenAI’s ‘Master of Disaster’ Fix AI’s Reputation Crisis?
items.summary: Global affairs chief Chris Lehane wants to tone down the debate over AI’s societal impacts—and get states to pass laws that won’t derail OpenAI’s meteoric rise.
